title: Use of synthetic circular RNA spike-ins (SynCRS) for normalization of circular RNA sequencing data
author: Conn, Vanessa

description: GTF and fasta files for addition of 6 SynCRS to genome annotation files fit for GENCODE, ensembl and UCSC. SyNCRS synthetic sequences added in txt format.
